title: Dance Selector

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"dance!" on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1.  Play music and seat dancers in a row before the switch user.
2.  The person in the first chair stands.
3.  If the user presses "next", that person sits and the next stands.
4.  If the user presses "dance!", the standing person dances for 10 seconds.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to scan through at least 3 people willing to dance. Whoever is chosen must strut their stuff!
